globalRule.description: Flags records where the Activation_Date is not in a valid YYYY-MM-DD format, combined with existing Subscriber_ID and Plan_ID, indicating a data parsing or entry error.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.Telecom_Dataset_500Rows` WHERE SAFE.PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', CAST(Activation_Date AS STRING)) IS NULL AND Subscriber_ID IS NOT NULL AND Plan_ID IS NOT NULL

globalRule.description: Identifies records where the Mobile_Number is duplicated across multiple subscriber entries, violating the uniqueness constraint for mobile numbers.
globalRule.expression: SELECT t1.* FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.Telecom_Dataset_500Rows` t1 JOIN (SELECT Mobile_Number FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.Telecom_Dataset_500Rows` GROUP BY Mobile_Number HAVING COUNT(Mobile_Number) > 1) t2 ON t1.Mobile_Number = t2.Mobile_Number WHERE t1.Subscriber_ID IS NOT NULL AND t1.Customer_Name IS NOT NULL

globalRule.description: Detects records where the Activation_Date is set to a future date, which is logically impossible for any account status, indicating a data entry error.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.Telecom_Dataset_500Rows` WHERE Activation_Date > CURRENT_DATE() AND Subscriber_ID IS NOT NULL AND Account_Status IS NOT NULL

globalRule.description: Identifies records where the Mobile_Number does not consist of exactly 10 digits, combined with existing Subscriber_ID and Customer_Name, indicating an invalid mobile number format.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.Telecom_Dataset_500Rows` WHERE LENGTH(CAST(Mobile_Number AS STRING)) != 10 AND Subscriber_ID IS NOT NULL AND Customer_Name IS NOT NULL
